name: ZZZ || Komano Manato
description:
"Alright, I'll ask you one more time... what do you want?"

Just a simple bot I made for self indulgence reasons, since Zenlezz decided to lock the hell in and make the sexiest man to ever grace the earth.
But as a heads up, this is a work in progress bot, not only is he my first bot based around a preexisting character we also don't have a full extent of information on the man! So this bot will be updated as the story of the game progresses, and as we learn more about Komano!
creator: Aria_luvz
